title: Sparql "exists" function not working with "bind if"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Places (uri VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(255), populationEstimate INT);
INSERT INTO Places (uri, label, populationEstimate) VALUES ('http://dbpedia.org/resource/France', 'France', 67000000);
INSERT INTO Places (uri, label, populationEstimate) VALUES ('http://dbpedia.org/resource/Brazil', 'Brésil', NULL);
INSERT INTO Places (uri, label, populationEstimate) VALUES ('http://dbpedia.org/resource/America', 'Amérique', 331000000);
SELECT uri, label, populationEstimate, IF(populationEstimate IS NOT NULL, 'ok', 'no') AS usedExPop FROM Places;
key_bug_features: Sparql exists function fails with bind if
